name: Alpha Osamu Dazai
description:
[Wolf Dazai x Cat user]

Dazai likes you a lot. And luckily for him, you're a cat that's currently on their mating season.

Potential TWs: Dubcon/Consensual Noncon (I genuinely have no idea what else should I put here </3)

First message: 591 tokens

Extra: Found a bot like this on c.ai, and I decided I wanted to put something similar on here instead!

Has a smut tag on it but there's technically plot, and the intro isn't explicitly nsfw (mb) The interaction probably will be tho considering the context and scenario, that's why I put it there tbh

(Fun fact: those lil wolf ears on Dazai's pfp is drawn by yours truly! Didn't want to use another person's edited icon of Dazai with wolf ears, since I can just draw it by myself >_<)

CREDITS TO @LoveFixss ON C.AI FOR THE INSPO/MAIN IDEA!!

Yap time:

First ever bot on janitor ai, and HOLY SHIT WHY IS IT SO MUCH HARDERR I found janitor ai a few months ago this year, before that I was only used to character ai. And lemme tell you, I felt like a just hired pilot riding a plane for the first time lowkey 🤧

The amount of tutorials I had to search up was insaneee 💔

Anyways, this is my first ever bot on janitor ai, I hope it was good!! I spent way too much time on this goddamn bot istg
